name: Train the Model, Not the Reader: Decodability Supervision for Verifiable Activation Explanations
summary: arXiv:2607.20379v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Natural-language autoencoders score explanations of hidden activations by reconstruction: an explanation is deemed faithful if the activation can be...
description: arXiv:2607.20379v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Natural-language autoencoders score explanations of hidden activations by reconstruction: an explanation is deemed faithful if the activation can be regenerated from it. The test is structurally insensitive to individual false claims: if flipping a claim does not change the reconstruction, the claim is never penalized. We show the test is passed i...
author: Hiskias Dingeto
